# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.3424
  biquad b0=1.00147285796 b1=-1.99272927615 b2=0.99138666243 a1=-1.99272927615 a2=0.992859520392
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 252.319 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.5210
  biquad b0=1.00187574203 b1=-1.99063484606 b2=0.989030578826 a1=-1.99063484606 a2=0.990906320858

  biquad b0=1.0151097954 b1=-1.92096875241 b2=0.911637257838 a1=-1.92096875241 a2=0.926747053235

  biquad b0=1.00048616566 b1=-1.99756192534 b2=0.997156882011 a1=-1.99756192534 a2=0.997643047673

  biquad b0=1.0005500587 b1=-1.99694753403 b2=0.996783232715 a1=-1.99694753403 a2=0.99733329142
